title: tragacantha thurberi
intro: Tragacantha thurberi, also known as Thurber's milkvetch or Mormon milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its saponin content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha thurberi include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function. Tragacantha thurberi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
